seoTitle: Tran Thi Luong | SEO & Growth Marketing Specialist Portfolio
seoDescription: Portfolio of Tran Thi Luong - SEO & Growth Marketing Enthusiast. Optimizing conversion, Technical SEO and data-driven growth marketing.

hero.headline: Scale Organic Traffic & Optimize Conversion Rate (CRO)
hero.subheadline: I'm Tran Thi Luong - SEO & Growth Marketing Specialist. Elevating businesses sustainably with Technical SEO, Topic Cluster strategy, and GA4/GTM data analysis.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Digital SEO & Growth Marketing path driven by performance data.
about.bio: I'm Tran Thi Luong, currently a 3rd-year Marketing Communications student at the University of Finance - Marketing (UFM). Driven by a passion for Technical SEO and Growth Marketing, I focus on analyzing user search intent, optimizing conversion rates (CRO), and building data-driven Topic Cluster content strategies.

benefits.title: Core Strengths & Solutions
benefits.subtitle: Solving organic search traffic growth and conversion funnel leaks.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.description: Optimizing site structure, Schema Markup, and Core Web Vitals to help search engines index your pages seamlessly.

items.title: Content Strategy
items.description: Building topic cluster strategies targeting high-value search intent keywords for maximum conversion impact.

items.title: Data Analytics & CRO
items.description: Setting up advanced tracking (GA4, GTM) and analyzing user behaviors (Hotjar) to continuously optimize conversion rates.

items.title: Growth Marketing
items.description: Running rapid channel tests, tracking growth funnels, and optimizing customer acquisition costs (CAC).

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: Work history and marketing impact across digital positions.

description: Delivered 10+ SEO-optimized articles monthly, ensuring alignment with keyword strategy and editorial guidelines.
Optimized content layout and keyword mapping according to user Search Intent.
Collaborated closely with design and management teams to ensure consistent brand voice.
Ideated and wrote engaging content for the official Fanpage, adjusting styles based on communication trends.
Contributed directly to the planning and execution of 5+ key marketing campaigns.
Monitored engagement performance to optimize posting schedule and reach.
Conducted market/user research and produced 15+ SEO articles monthly for the company's official site.
Worked across departments to standardize content review and optimization processes on digital platforms.
Tracked GA4 performance metrics and suggested visual improvements to enhance reading engagement.
Produced high-quality SEO content in diverse niches: tourism, airports, electrical devices, etc.
Ensured 100% on-page optimization checklist compliance, keyword placement, and project deadlines.

items.company: Brighten Kid's Smile & Chấm Bi Đỏ Project
description: Created detailed action plans and coordinated volunteering activities at SOS Children's Village.
Successfully secured partnerships with 2 media channels, 1 financial sponsor, and 2 in-kind sponsors for Chấm Bi Đỏ project.

certificates.subtitle: Credentials proving academic excellence and global digital marketing expertise.

socialProof.title: Client Testimonials
socialProof.subtitle: Real results achieved for brands and projects.

testimonials.name: Nguyen Van Minh
testimonials.content: Luong helped us scale organic search traffic by over 150% in 4 months and automated our lead-generation process. Highly professional and data-driven approach.

testimonials.name: Tran Thi Mai
testimonials.content: Excellent Technical SEO skills. She diagnosed and resolved indexing bugs that had affected our Search Console performance for months.
